inline_comments: HTTP server for receiving voice call webhooks from providers. Supports WebSocket upgrades for media streams when streaming is enabled.
Get the media stream handler (for wiring to provider).
Initialize media streaming with OpenAI Realtime STT.
Clear TTS queue on barge-in (user started speaking, interrupt current playback)
Look up our internal call ID from the provider call ID
Create a speech event and process it through the manager
Auto-respond in conversation mode (inbound always, outbound if mode is conversation)
Register stream with provider for TTS routing
Speak initial message if one was provided when call was initiated
Use setTimeout to allow stream setup to complete
Auto-end call when media stream disconnects to prevent stuck calls.
Without this, calls can remain active indefinitely after the stream closes.
Start the webhook server. Idempotent: returns immediately if the server is already listening.
Guard: if a server is already listening, return the existing URL.
This prevents EADDRINUSE when start() is called more than once on the
same instance (e.g. during config hot-reload or concurrent ensureRuntime).
Handle WebSocket upgrades for media streams
Start the stale call reaper if configured
Stop the webhook server.
Handle incoming HTTP request.
Read request body as string with timeout protection.
Handle auto-response for inbound calls using the agent system. Supports tool calling for richer voice interactions.
Get call context for conversation history

functions.name: initializeMediaStreaming
functions.doc: Initialize media streaming with OpenAI Realtime STT.

functions.name: start
functions.doc: Start the webhook server.     Idempotent: returns immediately if the server is already listening.

functions.name: handleInboundResponse
functions.doc: Handle auto-response for inbound calls using the agent system.     Supports tool calling for richer voice interactions.

classes.name: VoiceCallWebhookServer
classes.doc: HTTP server for receiving voice call webhooks from providers.   Supports WebSocket upgrades for media streams when streaming is enabled.

concerns: Multiple concerns detected: database, api, business_logic, auth, logging
